steps.title: Recognize that the task requires a definition
steps.content: The student's goal is to “define the term 'georeferencing,'” which means stating what it IS, not describing who used it or what it did. The notes provide the definition directly: georeferencing IS “the process of assigning geographic coordinates to an image” that enables “mapping software to place the image in its real-world location.”

steps.title: Identify the choice that provides the definition
steps.content: Choice B states the complete definition: “Georeferencing is the process of assigning geographic coordinates to an image so that mapping software can place it in its real-world location.” This directly tells us what georeferencing is. Choices A, C, and D describe applications, examples, or uses of the term rather than defining it. That matches choice B — B is correct.
